quantity_min.description: The cart's minimum quantity of associated variants needed to qualify for this tier's pricing.

quantity_max.description: The cart's maximum allowed quantity of associated variants to qualify for this tier's pricing.

type.description:
The type of adjustment that is made. 
Acceptable values: 
* price – the adjustment amount per product 
* percent – the adjustment as a percentage of the original price 
* fixed – the adjusted absolute price of the product

amount.description: The price adjustment amount. This value and the type will decide the price per variant for the pricing tier.
